ability: 每个夜晚，你会得知第一条被抽中的咒语的名称：你可以选择是否将其变为哑咒。
firstNightReminder: Tell the Thaumaturge the name of the first Spell you drew tonight and ask if they'd like to veto it. If yes, mark said Spell as a "Dud" and ignore its effects.
otherNightReminder: Tell the Thaumaturge the name of the first Spell you drew tonight and ask if they'd like to veto it. If yes, mark said Spell as a "Dud" and ignore its effects.
